zh.Blingel, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Cala: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布林爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de Blingel於1082年6月24日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布林爾時，她的父親Louis DE BLINGEL23歲，母親Marie DE TANGRY17歲。她和Hugues II de Rollancourt至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1135年9月27日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯洛藍古特享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blingel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Klingel ‘small bell’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a maker of handbells or alternatively a nickname for an incessant chatterer.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de Blingel was born on 24 June 1082, in Blingel, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Louis DE BLINGEL, was 23 and her mother, Marie DE TANGRY, was 17. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Hugues II de Rollancourt. She died on 27 September 1135, in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de Blingel est née le 24 juin 1082, à Blingel, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Louis DE BLINGEL, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Marie DE TANGRY, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Hugues II de Rollancourt. Elle est décédée le 27 septembre 1135, à Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de Blingel am 24. Juni 1082 in Blingel, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis DE BLINGEL 23 und ihre Mutter Marie DE TANGRY 17. Sie hatte mit Hugues II de Rollancourt mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. September 1135 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Blingel è nata il il 24 giugno 1082 nel Blingel, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Louis DE BLINGEL, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Marie DE TANGRY, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Hugues II de Rollancourt. Morì il 27 settembre 1135, nel Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Blingelが1082年6月24日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブリンジェルで生まれた時，父Louis DE BLINGELは23歳，母Marie DE TANGRYは17歳であった。彼女はHugues II de Rollancourtとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1135年9月27日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスロランコウルトで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de Blingel(이)가 1082년 6월 24일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 블링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis DE BLINGEL(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie DE TANGRY(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Hugues II de Rollancourt(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1135년 9월 27일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 롤랭쿠르트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de Blingel nasceu em 24 de junho de 1082, em Blingel, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Louis DE BLINGEL, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Marie DE TANGRY, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Hugues II de Rollancourt. Ela faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1135, em Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de Blingel родилась 24 июня 1082 г. в местности блингел, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis DE BLINGEL было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Marie DE TANGRY, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Hugues II de Rollancourt. Она умерла 27 сентября 1135 г. в местности ролланкоурт, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Hugues II de Rollancourt. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1135, en Rollancourt, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
